required_preferences.fact: Now delegates most project syncs to team leads and primarily attends executive and cross-department meetings—participates in core team discussions only for high stakes milestones or escalations

supersedes.fact: Holds all project syncs as video calls with cameras on—never allows purely audio meetings for core teams

required_preferences.fact: Preps quick, portable vegetarian meals as needed for herself and her mother—does not maintain a strict Sunday batch prep and often relies on ready-made options during weeks of medical caregiving

supersedes.fact: Preps all weekday lunches on Sundays to maintain a vegetarian diet—never eats meat during the workweek

required_preferences.fact: Reviews code only after engineers submit self-assessment notes—never gives feedback without context
Wears her CPAP device nightly without exception—never falls asleep without it, even for naps

Limits social media usage to a single 15-minute block after dinner—never checks feeds in the morning

persona: A 38-year-old software architect with a background in machine learning
